hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.js|*.mjs|*.ts|*.astro) npx eslint --fix "$f";; esac; case "$f" in *.scss|*.astro) npx stylelint --fix "$f";; esac; npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
